list.title: My vehicles
list.intro: Manage your vehicles. Vehicles can be combined into <trainsLink>trains</trainsLink>. For a vehicle to run on the layout, add it with the <addBtn>“Add to layout”</addBtn> button here as a standalone vehicle, or on the <trainsLink>trains page</trainsLink> as part of a train that has been added to the layout as a whole.
list.empty: You don't have any vehicles yet.

actions.lendRequiresLayout: Vehicle must be added to the layout
actions.lendRequiresDcc: A vehicle without a DCC address cannot be lent

list.deleteConfirmBody: This action cannot be undone. The vehicle must be removed from every train first.

catalogue.title: Available vehicles
catalogue.intro: Browse every registered vehicle. You can modify only your own rolling stock — or, as an admin, other users' vehicles.
catalogue.empty: No vehicles have been registered yet.

actions.lendOwnerOnly: Only the owner can lend out this vehicle

trainCatalogue.title: Available trains
trainCatalogue.intro: Browse every registered train. You can modify only your own consists — or, as an admin, other users' trains.
trainCatalogue.empty: No trains have been registered yet.

trainList.title: My trains
trainList.intro: Manage your trains. A train is a consist of multiple vehicles that move together and are identified as one train. A train added to the layout can be controlled as a whole — then all vehicles move together, even when there are several powered vehicles. Trains can be programmed — for example, to turn wagon lights on in sequence or play sounds in different vehicles beyond the locomotive pulling the consist.
trainList.empty: You don't have any trains yet.

actions.lendRequiresLayout: Train must be added to the layout

trainList.deleteConfirmBody: This action cannot be undone. Vehicles in this train will stay in your catalogue.

vehicles.title: Vehicles on layout
vehicles.empty: No vehicles have been added to this layout yet.

trains.title: Trains on layout
trains.empty: No trains have been added to this layout yet.

fields.name: Name
fields.dccAddressHelp: Leave empty to create a dummy vehicle – visible on the layout but not steerable.
fields.poolEmpty: You don't have any DCC pool assigned – you can still add dummy vehicles.

deadManSwitch.stop_horn_emergency_lights: Stop, honk and turn on emergency lights / Pc6

fields.name: Train name
fields.membersHelp: Pick at least one vehicle. Reorder with the arrow buttons; tick “reversed” for a vehicle coupled the other way around.

trainDialog.noVehicles: You don't have any vehicles yet. Add one to your catalogue first.
